from __future__ import annotations


class Tx:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.state = "idle"

    def begin(self) -> None:
        self.state = "open"

    def commit(self) -> None:
        self.state = "committed"

    def rollback(self) -> None:
        self.state = "rolled_back"


def transaction_block_missing_rollback_on_exception_positive() -> str:
    tx = Tx()
    tx.begin()
    try:
        raise RuntimeError("boom")
    except RuntimeError:
        return tx.state
